purpose: Probe whether an explicit worker-RPC retry anchor can sustain a thesis-grade worker-channel action better than the older forced-close-only slot.

Hadoop.alert_match: 2015-10-17 21:49:53,325 INFO [main] org.apache.hadoop.ipc.Client: Retrying connect to server: minint-fnanli5.fareast.corp.microsoft.com/10.86.169.121:49594. Already tried 0 time(s); retry policy is RetryUpToMaximumCountWithFixedSleep(maxRetries=10, sleepTime=1000 MILLISECONDS)
Hadoop.eligibility_note: Worker-RPC retry redesign candidate. This anchor names the failing worker endpoint directly instead of relying on a generic socket-reader forced-close line.
